stats.fact: Lovable raised $330M in Series B funding at a $6.6B valuation, led by CapitalG and Menlo Ventures, closing in December 2025
Lovable hit $400M ARR in February 2026, up from $200M in November 2025 and $100M in July 2025
Lovable has approximately 8 million users as of early 2026
Platform surpassed 25 million total projects with 100,000+ new projects per day
Lovable 2.0 multi-step agentic mode reduces errors by 91% compared to the old single-step approach
At Zendesk, prototyping time dropped from 6 weeks to 3 hours using Lovable
Free plan: 30 credits/month plus 5 daily bonus credits; paid plans start at $25/month for 100 credits
Lovable 2.0 (launched February 2026) supports real-time multi-user collaboration for up to 20 users
Lovable's valuation more than tripled in roughly five months (from Series A to Series B in 2025)
Enterprise customers include Klarna, Uber, and Zendesk
